## Meeting Purpose

[To set expectations for Nathalie's new role and define the team's efficiency-focused direction.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Primary KPI is Efficiency:** Reduce post-Atlas editing time (currently 1.5–2 hrs/article) to enable MEs to manage 3–5+ clients.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Problem: Misused Atlas:** Overly detailed prompts and manual workarounds create conflicts, leading to poor output and high editing overhead.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [**Solution: A New Workflow:** Use a Claude project to iteratively refine pipelines. The process: manually edit an article → ask Claude to reverse-engineer the edits into a post-processing instruction set → embed this set in the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)
  - [**New Role: Client Ops Engineer:** These engineers will partner with MEs to build custom pipelines, freeing MEs to focus on client strategy and content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Inefficient Content Production

  - [**High Editing Overhead:** Post-Atlas editing takes 1.5–2 hours per article, making the current process unsustainable.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Root Cause: Misused Atlas:**](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
      - [**Overly Detailed Prompts:** Specific instructions (e.g., "H2 must have 6 points in 150 words") create conflicts with artifacts and guidelines, resulting in poor drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
      - [**Manual Workarounds:** MEs bypass Atlas for manual editing in Claude or Google Docs, which is inefficient and prevents platform improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=3223.0)
  - [**Consequence:** This inefficiency prevents MEs from scaling to manage 3–5+ clients, which is a key company goal.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)

### The Solution: A New Workflow for Pipeline Optimization

  - [**Goal:** Build "leverage" by making 60 hours of work achievable in 40 hours.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Recommended Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)
    1.  [**Create a Claude Project:** Dedicate a project per client/task (e.g., "Interwell Pipeline Builder") to leverage Claude's project-specific memory.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
    2.  [**Seed the Project:** Provide context like the GitHub `README` (for YAML structure), a benchmark pipeline, and agentic workflow docs.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
    3.  **Iterate to Refine:**
          - [**Initial Draft:** Give Atlas a simple topic and structure.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=3349.0)
          - [**Manual Edit:** Manually edit the output to meet client standards.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)
          - [**Reverse-Engineer:** Ask Claude to analyze the edits and generate a post-processing instruction set.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)
          - [**Embed in Pipeline:** Add the instruction set to the Atlas pipeline (e.g., in a `content post-processing agentic workflow`).](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=2369.0)
          - [**Test & Repeat:** Run new articles and refine the instructions based on the output.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=2297.0)
  - [**Example: Monograph Client:** This process reduced post-Atlas editing to 5–8 minutes per article and contributed to a 400% traffic increase.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

### Supporting Structure: Client Tiers & Client Ops Engineers

  - [**Client Tiering:** To manage resources, clients will be categorized:](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [**Self-Service:** Platform-only access with pre-built workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [**Core ICP:** Standard clients with high-performing pipelines (e.g., Monograph).](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [**Custom:** High-touch clients requiring custom engineering (e.g., Surge, Biologica).](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [**Client Ops Engineers:** These engineers will partner with MEs to build and optimize pipelines, enabling MEs to focus on client strategy and content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nathalie:** Request a personal Atlas sandbox from Nana for experimentation.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [**Nathalie:** Apply the new workflow to optimize pipelines for Strategy Sprints clients.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=3154.0)
  - [**Matthew:** Share the new workflow with the Surge team (Ismael, Sucheta, Martha) to improve their custom content production process.](https://fathom.video/share/vLizEXDjz5j7RMiKcihDA4gwcsj422h8?tab=summary&timestamp=3375.0)
